Given the context, the user is likely asking if I can see/remember the prior work. I should confirm yes, summarize the key state, and ask what they want me to do next.

responseMessageContents.title: Cleaning up old system connections and preparing the application for final updates.
responseMessageContents.description: This update focuses on removing dependencies on previous external services to make the app more independent. It also includes steps to fix login issues and ensures that all parts of the system are ready to be updated to the latest version successfully.
